node.name: subscription-api
node.description: A production-grade subscription management REST API built with .NET 10, PostgreSQL, and Docker.

node.name: etl-pipline
node.description: This ETL (Extract, Transform, Load) pipeline automates gathering weather and city data from multiple sources, cleaning and transforming it, and loading the results into a PostgreSQL database. A scheduler enables daily automated runs, and a GitHub Actions CI/CD workflow handles continuous deployment.

node.name: genai-chatbot
node.description: A full-stack AI chatbot built with React and Express.js, powered by OpenAI's ChatGPT API. Features security hardening with Helmet, CORS restrictions, rate limiting, and input validation. Containerized with Docker.

node.name: motivational-quotes-api
node.description: A simple REST API built with FastAPI that serves random motivational quotes, with an interactive UI to browse and discover them.
